reviews.review_description:
After a bit of a rough start, NUC has started to find its stride. Launch issues aside, NUC is a fast paced and FUN family friendly (when you use that mute button anyways, lol) title - WITH NO ADDITIONAL COST! NO micro-transactions. An entirely free seasonal battle-pass, and dlc.  Overall the gunplay is being rapidly polished and the parkour system is perfect. 

With the promise of free content and weekly gameplay updates its hard not to recommend, Nerf Ultimate Championship!
The game is good except there’s ￼￼like 0 guns also if you  read this please ad a jolt

developer_response.body: Jolts are one of our most requested Blasters! Definitely on list to add to the game!

reviews.review_title: Best credit shooter I have played!!!
reviews.review_description: Fun, easy to learn and great gun mechanics. Definitely recommend!!!
Best game ever

developer_response.body: Thank you for taking the time to leave us a review, glad you enjoyed the game!

reviews.review_description: The game won’t load…my 8 year old is so upset 😢😢😢

developer_response.body:
A patch for this issue is now live on the store. Please update your game and you should be able to connect and play! 

If you are still experiencing issues connecting, we have QA online and able to help on our Discord - https://discord.com/invite/NERFVR

reviews.review_description: I played for 3 hours its really fun but there is a lot of minor bugs. the friends list is bugged pls fix that and the gun handling Is also bugged and the vaulting is also a little bugged if you guy fix all of that. Its a 5 star for me

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing and taking the time to leave us a review! We're actively working on bug fixes and will be releasing regular updates. Thanks you for your patience as we we iron out these early launch wrinkles!

Update: 
We just released an update that should significantly improve the gameplay experience and hit registration for players! We'd love to hear your feedback on this latest update.

reviews.review_description: Game is overall good but the fact that my first game was matched up with sweaty people jumping up n down shooting at spawn the game would be awesome if they added a ranked matchmaking like new players with new players experienced players with experienced players so you don’t face off your first game with a bunch of sweat load of people hopping like a bunny spawn killing but this game is overall great with the parkour and really fun

developer_response.body:
Hey Ko.0, thanks for playing and taking the time to leave us a review!

I'm sorry that you ran into that problem on your first game. One thing that may help in that situation in the future is that every spawn has multiple exits that you can use. In addition, you can fire out of your spawn and the enemy cannot fire in. This should help allow you to flank and clear our any enemy players that are too close to your spawn. As you're learning to play, I'd suggest using the Auto Prime setting for the Blasters, as they'll allow you to worry about fewer things and just get a hang of reloading and firing. 

Thanks again for playing!
